_doc: Per-symbol-family parameter multipliers. Edit here — reloaded every hour without bot restart. See bot/family_profiles.py for full documentation.

multipliers._doc: Values multiply the strategy's BASE parameter. 1.0 = no change. See examples below.

BTC_ETH._doc: BTC/ETH: deep liquidity, slow trends, tight spreads. Tighter stops OK.

LARGE_ALTS._doc: SOL/BNB/AVAX/etc: volatile but liquid. Wider stops, lower vol-spike bar.

MID_ALTS._doc: Everything else: thin books, noisy, but big moves when they happen. Widest stops + longest cooldown.

_example_overrides._doc: To force a symbol into a specific family without changing this file, set env var: FAMILY_OVERRIDE_SOLUSDT=BTC_ETH
_example_overrides._note: Symbols not listed in any family go to MID_ALTS automatically
